questions.question: Why does the SealedBidMarketplace contract inherit from AbstractBlocklockReceiver?
options: To request time-locked decryption and receive callbacks when decryption keys are ready
questions.correctAnswer: To request time-locked decryption and receive callbacks when decryption keys are ready

questions.question: Bids can be decrypted before the reveal block height is reached.
What happens during the _onBlocklockReceived callback?
options: The contract decrypts the ciphertext using the provided decryption key and reveals the bid amount
questions.correctAnswer: The contract decrypts the ciphertext using the provided decryption key and reveals the bid amount

questions.question: The listing state changes to ______ after the winner is selected.
Who can call the selectWinner function?
options: Anyone, once the end block height is reached
questions.correctAnswer: Anyone, once the end block height is reached

questions.question: In cross-chain payments, what does the solver fee pay for?
options: Gas costs on the destination chain
The liquidity provider who fulfills the swap by sending tokens from their own funds
questions.correctAnswer: The liquidity provider who fulfills the swap by sending tokens from their own funds

questions.question: The contract can see the bid amounts before they are decrypted.
